description: Balanced climate resilience value across exposure vulnerability adaptation recovery transformation justice and maladaptation risk.
Prioritizes keeping people ecosystems infrastructure and assets out of harm's way.
Prioritizes reducing susceptibility to climate harm through housing health income water ecosystems and institutions.
Prioritizes learning flexibility monitoring and adaptive capacity.
Prioritizes restoring essential functions after climate shocks.
Prioritizes deeper structural change where incremental adaptation is insufficient.
Prioritizes protection for highly exposed communities and reduction of unequal climate burden.
Prioritizes penalties for short-term adaptation that deepens long-term fragility or shifts risk.
